sourceMovie.title: Sly
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Sly (2023) stuck because it commits to its documentary premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Thom Zimny's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The film leans hard into its core genre, which is exactly what fans say they wanted more of from blockbusters in that era.

recommendations.title: This Is It
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Sly clicked for you, This Is It (2009) is a strong next stop: both trade in documentary, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Sly?
faq.answer: Try This Is It, Miss Americana, Side by Side—each shares DNA with Sly while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Sly?
faq.answer: Sly (2023) is best described as Documentary. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Sly worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.2/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this documentary lane.
